name: Chicken Chow Mein
recipeIngredient: 1 4 pound hen or fryer, cut into pieces
6-8.5 oz can water chestnuts, drained and sliced
Chow mein noodles or fluffy rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Place chicken, water, onions, and celery in a Crock-Pot.
2. Cover and cook on Low for 8 to 10 hours.
3. One hour before serving, turn the setting to High. Remove chicken, bone, and cut meat into bite-size pieces. Return to Crock-Pot.
4. Combine flour with soy sauce and stir into Crock-Pot with bean sprouts, bamboo shoots, water chestnuts, and molasses. Stir until thickened. Taste for seasoning.
5. Turn the setting back to Low until ready to serve, up to 4 hours.
6. Serve over chow mein noodles or hot fluffy rice. Sprinkle with toasted slivered almonds.
Serves 8 to 10
